title: Nostalgia Galore
description: A resource pack that expands programmer art
body:
Nostalgia Galore
-The texture pack that makes the new the old. Heavily inspired by Golden Days by PoeticRainbow and Old Minecraft. This texture pack changes blocks, mobs, items, GUI, sounds, and much more to look like older versions of Minecraft.

Helpful Info
-It's recommended to use Optifine or Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features for the mobs changed to work properly .
-Enable programmer art first it is needed for more authentic experience.
-This texture pack was first made privately for me to try to enjoy modern Minecraft more but I decided to tweak it and publish it

Disclaimer
-This texture pack is still unfinished as there are some newer mobs that still need to be changed
-There may be some items and blocks I missed
-Feedback is greatly appreciated since I am new at texture packing and I am willing to update this pack and in the future work on other projects.
